steps.title: Find the key contrast clue
steps.content: The notes list the thickness of each fiber: TPU is 3 mm thick, SEBS is 4 mm thick.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly contrasts the two samples by noting that the SEBS rubber sample was thicker than the TPU sample, using the thickness figures from the notes.
The other three either give only general information, mention both samples without highlighting a difference, or state that both temperatures rose, which shows similarity rather than contrast.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
